sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n86258" key="prau/+tropos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πρᾱΰ-τροπος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n86258.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">gentle of mood,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τὸ π. τοῦ λόγου</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.493d</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (s. v. l.).</sense> </entryFree>
